meta.title: Vendi — Your online store, live in minutes
meta.description: Vendi by Olcas: create your business's online store in minutes. Premium catalog, real-time orders and built-in card payments.

common.errorDescription: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

landing.heroTitle: Your online store, live in minutes.
landing.heroSubtitle: For any business: restaurants, fashion, crafts, services. A beautiful catalog, real-time orders and card payments. No coding required.
landing.trustedBy: The serious way to sell online, without the hassle
landing.step1Text: Sign up, name it, and your store has its own link. Truly in minutes.
landing.step2Text: Photos, prices and stock. A premium-finish catalog you'll love to share.
landing.step3Text: Every order lands instantly on your panel and card payments go to your account.
landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need. Nothing you don't.
landing.feature1Text: Your panel is a live register: every sale arrives instantly, no refreshing, no waiting for emails.
landing.feature2Text: Charge with PSE, Nequi and cards via Mercado Pago, live in minutes. No impossible integrations.
landing.feature3Text: You set your store's shipping price. No imposed carriers, no surprises.
landing.feature4Text: Start with your Vendi link and connect your own domain whenever you want (Pro plan).
landing.pricingSubtitle: Start free. Upgrade when your business asks for it.
landing.finalCtaTitle: Your business deserves a serious store.
landing.finalCtaText: Join Vendi and publish your catalog today.

auth.registerSubtitle: Start free and launch your first store today
auth.name: Name
auth.registerError: Couldn't create the account. Check your details.
auth.forgotSubtitle: We'll send you a link to create a new one
auth.forgotSent: If an account exists with that email, you'll receive a link in a few minutes.
auth.resetSubtitle: Choose a new password for your account
auth.resetSuccess: Password updated. You can sign in now.
auth.resetError: The link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one.
auth.verifiedOk: Email verified successfully. You can sign in now.
auth.verifiedFail: The verification link is invalid or has expired.

dashboard.title: Your stores
dashboard.subtitle: Manage your stores, products and orders.
dashboard.noStores: You don't have any store yet. Create your first one:
dashboard.newStoreSubtitle: Give it a name and start selling in minutes.
dashboard.createStoreError: Couldn't create the store. Check your details.
dashboard.noOrders: No orders yet. Share your store to start selling.
dashboard.addProductError: Couldn't create the product. Check your details.
dashboard.dangerText: Your personal data will be deleted and your stores will be unpublished. Orders are kept anonymized for tax obligations. This action cannot be undone.
dashboard.deleteConfirm: Are you sure? This action is final.
dashboard.billingFreeText: You're on the Free plan: 1 store, 10 products and a 3% fee per sale.
dashboard.billingProText: You're Pro: unlimited stores and products with only a 1% fee.
dashboard.billingPending: Your payment is processing. As soon as Mercado Pago confirms it, your Pro activates.
dashboard.billingSuccess: Welcome to Vendi Pro! Your account is now upgraded.
dashboard.billingCancelled: Payment cancelled. You're still on the Free plan.
dashboard.billingUnavailable: Payments will be available very soon.
dashboard.planLimit: You've reached your plan's limit. Go Pro to unlock unlimited.
dashboard.paymentsText: Connect Mercado Pago so your customers can pay by card or PSE. Vendi only keeps its per-sale fee.
dashboard.connectErrorToast: Couldn't connect Mercado Pago. Please try again.
dashboard.pushText: Get an alert on your phone or computer every time an order comes in, even with the browser closed.
dashboard.pushDenied: Notifications are blocked in your browser. Unblock them in the site settings and reload.
dashboard.pushIosHint: Your browser doesn't support them here. On iPhone: Share → "Add to Home Screen" and enable them from the installed app.
dashboard.hoursLegacy: Current text schedule: "{schedule}". Add rows to replace it with structured hours.
dashboard.locationSet: Location captured. Save the store to apply it.
dashboard.locationHint: City and location make your store show up in Explore's nearby searches.
dashboard.shippingText: Flat shipping price added to every order. Set 0 if shipping is free.
dashboard.legalText: Vendi uses these details to generate your store's legal page (required to sell seriously).
dashboard.cancelText: The order will be cancelled forever. If the customer already paid, handle the refund from Mercado Pago.
dashboard.deleteText: It will disappear from your store's catalog. Past orders are not modified.
dashboard.productHasOrders: This product has orders: deactivate it instead of deleting it
dashboard.deleteStoreText: The store is unpublished and removed from the panel. Orders are kept for your accounting.
dashboard.pickupHint: If enabled, customers can pick up and pay at the store
dashboard.noProductsYet: Create your first product and assign it to a store.
dashboard.storeInfoText: Your store link doesn't change when you rename it.
dashboard.connectRedirect: We're taking you to Mercado Pago securely to connect your account…
dashboard.logoText: Shown in your public store header and next to its name in the panel.
dashboard.domainText: Connect your own domain to this store. Vendi issues the SSL certificate automatically as soon as the DNS points here.
dashboard.domainInstructions: Create one of these records in your DNS provider's panel:
dashboard.domainNotYet: The DNS doesn't point to Vendi yet. Propagation can take up to 1 hour.
dashboard.domainTaken: That domain is already connected to another store
dashboard.domainBuyHint: Don't have a domain yet? We'll guide you to buy it at Cloudflare at cost price.
dashboard.buyGuideStep1: Search and buy your domain at Cloudflare (cost price, no hidden margins):
dashboard.buyGuideStep2: In Cloudflare → DNS, create one of these records:
dashboard.buyGuideStep3: Come back here, type your domain and connect it: the SSL certificate is issued automatically and your store is hosted instantly.
dashboard.buyGuideNote: Buying takes ~2 minutes and DNS usually propagates in under 1 hour.

tracking.title: Your order at {storeName}
tracking.msgReceived: The store has received your order!
tracking.msgPreparing: {vertical, select, food {We're preparing your order, it's in the kitchen!} digital {We're preparing your digital order} other {We're preparing your order with care}}
tracking.msgReady: Your order is on its way!
tracking.msgReadyPickup: Your order is ready! Come pick it up
tracking.rateHint: Your feedback helps {storeName} and other customers.

empty.ordersHint: Share your store link and orders will show up here instantly.
empty.productsHint: Add your first product with the form above.
empty.storesHint: In a minute it has a name, its own link and a catalog ready to share.
empty.catalogHint: This store is still preparing its catalog.

celebration.proText: Unlimited stores and products, your own domain and only a 1% fee. Thank you for trusting Vendi.

explore.title: Explore the stores
explore.subtitle: Discover the businesses already selling with Vendi.
explore.holidayNotice: Today is a public holiday ({name}): the store may be closed
explore.empty: No stores here yet. Yours could be the first!

comanda.topEmpty: No delivered sales in this period yet
comanda.cancelReasonPlaceholder: E.g.: we ran out of ingredients
comanda.phaseKitchenLabel: {vertical, select, food {Time in kitchen} other {Prep time}}

store.noProducts: This store doesn't have products yet.
store.orderDone: Order sent! The store will get in touch with you.
store.orderError: Couldn't send the order. Please try again.
store.cartEmptyHint: Add products from the catalog to get started.
store.payNote: If the store has payments enabled, you'll go to Mercado Pago's secure gateway.
store.orderConfirmedText: The store received your order instantly and will contact you at {email}.
store.outOfStockError: Not enough stock for an item in your cart
store.paidSuccess: Payment completed! Thank you for your purchase.
store.paidCancelled: Payment cancelled. You can try again anytime.
store.trackHint: Save this link to track your order in real time.
